name: Leucine
note: Branched-chain amino acid — substrate of BCAT/BCKDH

name: 3-Hydroxyisobutyrate
note: Valine catabolism intermediate; vascular dysfunction marker

name: Phenylpyruvate
note: Structural analog of BCKAs (not BCAA pathway)

name: Acetyl-CoA
note: Central acyl-carrier — produced by BCAA catabolism

name: Phenylbutyrate
note: 4-phenylbutyrate — used to lower BCAAs in MSUD

name: Rapamycin
note: Inhibits mTOR — would relieve BCAA -> mTOR signaling
